tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall service custom
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall address
config firewall address
    edit "none"
        set uuid 4b93780e-2aaa-51f1-661c-400dbb1190b1
        set subnet 0.0.0.0 255.255.255.255
    next
    edit "login.microsoftonline.com"
        set uuid 4b937f98-2aaa-51f1-ba50-9e269099a44c
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoftonline.com"
    next
    edit "login.microsoft.com"
        set uuid 4b9386a0-2aaa-51f1-3479-d72cd658c9ea
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.microsoft.com"
    next
    edit "login.windows.net"
        set uuid 4b938b82-2aaa-51f1-9651-5c969472a928
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "login.windows.net"
    next
    edit "gmail.com"
        set uuid 4b93906e-2aaa-51f1-6ce0-e362e47da6e0
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "gmail.com"
next
    edit "wildcard.google.com"
        set uuid 4b939532-2aaa-51f1-d740-402806da042b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.google.com"
    next
    edit "wildcard.dropbox.com"
        set uuid 4b939a00-2aaa-51f1-57bc-c5df07b8957b
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn "*.dropbox.com"
    next
    edit "all"
        set uuid 4cc9d646-2aaa-51f1-f874-eaa5ad2f756b
    next
    edit "FIREWALL_AUTH_PORTAL_ADDRESS"
        set uuid 4cc9d8ee-2aaa-51f1-48b3-d0af865bf9e3
    next
    edit "FABRIC_DEVICE"
        set uuid 4cc9dd62-2aaa-51f1-2394-79a4d795a23f
        set comment "IPv4 addresses of Fabric Devices."
    next
    edit "SSLVPN_TUNNEL_ADDR1"
        set uuid 4cca9c16-2aaa-51f1-9e6e-812d9da92f73
        set type iprange
set start-ip 10.212.134.200
        set end-ip 10.212.134.210
    next
    edit "LAN_subnet"
        set uuid 86c374ba-2aaa-51f1-9136-a3a9e06535af

    edit "Caldera_Server"

        set uuid 929f02e0-2aaa-51f1-9434-6b57c1417ba1
        set type dynamic
        set sub-type ems-tag
    next
end

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
                 set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
                      set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel                 s                 set category "Email"
        set tcp-portr             edit "FTP_PUT"
        set category "File Access"
                     unset icmptype
    next
    e             next
    edit "DHCP"
                         set tcp-portrange 389             edit "NTP"

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall service custom
    edit "DNS-TUNNEL"
        set category "Network Services"
        set udp-portrange 8853
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall service custom

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) #     edit "DNS-TUNNEL"
new entry 'DNS-TUNNEL' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-TUNNEL) #         set category "Network Services"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-TUNNEL) #         set udp-portrange 8853

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (DNS-TUNNEL) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (custom) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Block-DNS-Tunnel"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-TUNNEL"
    next
end"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 101
new entry '101' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set name "Block-DNS-Tunnel"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #         set service "DNS-TUNNEL"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (101) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set utm-status enable
        set ips-sensor "default"
        set nat enable
        set comments "DNS tunneling mitigation: block direct DNS to WAN requires DNS filter profile unavailable in this build"
    next
    edit 101
        set name "Block-DNS-Tunnel"
        set uuid 7f697b6a-3351-51f1-3058-be2048181d07
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-TUNNEL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 101 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Block-DNS-Tunnel"
        set uuid 7f697b6a-3351-51f1-3058-be2048181d07
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "LAN_subnet"
        set dstaddr "Caldera_Server"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-TUNNEL"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set utm-status enable
        set ips-sensor "default"
set nat enable
        set comments "DNS tunneling mitigation: block direct DNS to WAN requires DNS filter profile unavailable in this build"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
